message:
feat(connectors): fill all empty common_mistakes across 71 connector manifests

Every operation across all 84 connectors now has at least one
connector-specific common_mistake in its ai_hints section.

Cohorts covered:
- Workspace/productivity: gmail, google-calendar, notion, microsoft365,
  linear, jira, figma, airtable, clickup, todoist, monday, trello,
  asana, box, dropbox, evernote, logseq, roam, pandadoc, docusign
- Data/storage/analytics: vectordb, qdrant, pinecone, mongodb, duckdb,
  s3, snowflake, bigquery, elasticsearch, algolia, stripe, salesforce,
  hubspot, plaid, 1password, bitwarden
- Research/media: arxiv, semanticscholar, annas-archive, spotify
- Analytics: amplitude, mixpanel, posthog, segment, metabase, retool
- DevTools/SCM: github, gitlab, bitbucket, sentry, datadog, grafana
- Messaging/social: slack, discord, telegram, twitter, linkedin,
  intercom, sendgrid, mailchimp, twilio
- Infra/automation: kubernetes, terraform, pulumi, cron,
  webhook-receiver, n8n, make, zapier, homeassistant
- Remaining: zendesk, duckdb, whisper

Closes beads 1g7z0.15, 1g7z0.17

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
